name: caido-cli
title: caido-cli

commands.name: caido-cli

arguments.description: Enable invisible mode for all listeners
arguments.raw: --invisible                                  Enable invisible mode for all listeners

arguments.description: Do not open the UI a browser tab
arguments.raw: --no-open                                    Do not open the UI a browser tab

arguments.description: Reset the instance cache of cloud data
arguments.raw: --reset-cache                                Reset the instance cache of cloud data

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# caido-cli -h
 A lightweight web security auditing toolkit
 
 Usage: caido-cli [OPTIONS]
 
 Options:
 -l, --listen <ADDR:PORT>                         Listening address
     --invisible                                  Enable invisible mode for all listeners
     --no-sync                                    Enable sync with sync server
     --proxy-listen <ADDR:PORT>                   Proxy listening addresses
     --ui-listen <ADDR:PORT>                      UI listening addresses
     --ui-domain <UI_DOMAIN>                      Allowed domains for UI
     --no-open                                    Do not open the UI a browser tab
     --debug                                      Record and display debug logs
     --reset-cache                                Reset the instance cache of cloud data
     --reset-credentials                          Reset the instance credentials (DANGEROUS)
     --data-path <DATA_PATH>                      Directory to store data
     --no-logging                                 Disable file logging
     --no-renderer-sandbox                        Disable sandboxing for the renderer
     --import-ca-cert <IMPORT_CA_CERT>            Import CA certificate
     --import-ca-cert-pass <IMPORT_CA_CERT_PASS>  Import CA certificate password
     --allow-guests                               Allow login as guest
     --safe                                       Enable safe mode
     --registration-key <ckey_[20 characters]>    Registration key [env: CAIDO_REGISTRATION_KEY=]
 -h, --help                                       Print help (see more with '--help')
 -V, --version                                    Print version

local_help.--help:
A lightweight web security auditing toolkit

Usage: caido-cli [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -l, --listen <ADDR:PORT>
          Listening address
          
          Defaults to 127.0.0.1:8080

      --invisible
          Enable invisible mode for all listeners

      --no-sync
          Enable sync with sync server

      --proxy-listen <ADDR:PORT>
          Proxy listening addresses
          
          If at least one address is specified and --listen is not, the default address won't be used

      --ui-listen <ADDR:PORT>
          UI listening addresses
          
          If at least one address is specified and --listen is not, the default address won't be used

      --ui-domain <UI_DOMAIN>
          Allowed domains for UI

      --no-open
          Do not open the UI a browser tab

      --debug
          Record and display debug logs

      --reset-cache
          Reset the instance cache of cloud data

      --reset-credentials
          Reset the instance credentials (DANGEROUS)

      --data-path <DATA_PATH>
          Directory to store data

      --no-logging
          Disable file logging

      --no-renderer-sandbox
          Disable sandboxing for the renderer

      --import-ca-cert <IMPORT_CA_CERT>
          Import CA certificate

      --import-ca-cert-pass <IMPORT_CA_CERT_PASS>
          Import CA certificate password

      --allow-guests
          Allow login as guest

      --safe
          Enable safe mode

      --registration-key <ckey_[20 characters]>
          Registration key
          
          This is used to automatically register the instance in a workspace.
          
          [env: CAIDO_REGISTRATION_KEY=]

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')

  -V, --version
          Print version
local_help.-h:
A lightweight web security auditing toolkit

Usage: caido-cli [OPTIONS]

Options:

      --invisible                                  Enable invisible mode for all listeners
      --no-sync                                    Enable sync with sync server
      --proxy-listen <ADDR:PORT>                   Proxy listening addresses

      --no-open                                    Do not open the UI a browser tab
      --debug                                      Record and display debug logs
      --reset-cache                                Reset the instance cache of cloud data
      --reset-credentials                          Reset the instance credentials (DANGEROUS)
      --data-path <DATA_PATH>                      Directory to store data
      --no-logging                                 Disable file logging
      --no-renderer-sandbox                        Disable sandboxing for the renderer
      --import-ca-cert <IMPORT_CA_CERT>            Import CA certificate

      --allow-guests                               Allow login as guest
      --safe                                       Enable safe mode

binary_metadata.file_type: POSIX shell script, Unicode text, UTF-8 text executable

apt_metadata.description:
security auditing toolkit (CLI)
This package contains caido CLI, a security auditing toolkit.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
